pass_rule: Selected concept remains within low-speed urban envelope not exceeding 50 km/h
comment: Checks that the selected concept is suitable for low-speed urban operation

pass_rule: Estimated range is calculated and reported for each vehicle concept
comment: Checks that range estimation is available for concept selection

pass_rule: Total weighted score is calculated for each concept and one concept is selected
comment: Checks that concept selection is based on a documented scoring method

pass_rule: Stopping distance is calculated and is positive for each scenario
comment: Checks stopping-distance calculation using speed friction and delay

pass_rule: TTC is calculated when relative speed is greater than zero
comment: Checks TTC calculation using target distance and relative speed

pass_rule: Warning state follows the defined stopping-distance and TTC threshold table
comment: Checks SAFE CAUTION WARNING and EMERGENCY_BRAKE classification

pass_rule: If warning_state is EMERGENCY_BRAKE then brake_request equals 1
comment: Checks emergency brake request generation under critical condition

pass_rule: Stopping distance with actuator delay is greater than stopping distance without actuator delay
comment: Checks that actuator delay affects stopping-distance verification

pass_rule: Actuator candidate is selected using documented weighted criteria
comment: Checks actuator selection at concept level

pass_rule: Each major requirement is linked to at least one function logical block physical element and verification item
